title: SVG id/class/::part completion + live current-state
manager: Complete the SVG rendering contract — stable ids, classes, and `::part` handles on every element, plus a live current-state indicator — so a rendered machine is fully styleable and animatable from outside, and a running machine can highlight where it is. This is what turns FSL's SVG output from a static picture into a live, themeable UI surface, and it finishes the long #315 exposure work that themes and animation all depend on.
cs: SVG id/class/::part completion + live current-state highlight (fsl#315 verify + themes cluster); render-layer URL sanitization per #317; the styling/animation contract for viewers.
